query:
SELECT id, questionType, question, SUBSTRING(question, 1, 50) as question_preview
FROM quiz_questions 
WHERE lessonId = 600001
ORDER BY questionOrder;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT id, questionType, question, SUBSTRING(question, 1, 50) as question_preview
FROM quiz_questions 
WHERE lessonId = 600001
ORDER BY questionOrder;
